text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Time to race, Trainer. I'm so ready for
this.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All this pre-race excitement has got me fired up!
I'm itchin' to get runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Leave it to me! I'm gonna take everyone
out!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna look so cool takin' first place that you'll
never be able to forget it!
